title: Positive flow: Selecting an animal image
preconditions: The app is open and on the gallery screen.
test_data: The user selects an animal image from the 3x3 grid.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the gallery screen. | Tap on one of the animal images in the 3x3 grid.
expected_result: The selected animal image is highlighted or matched with the central pig image.

title: Negative flow: No selection
preconditions: The app is open and on the gallery screen.
test_data: The user does not select any animal image from the 3x3 grid.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the gallery screen. | Do not tap on any of the animal images in the 3x3 grid.
expected_result: No action is taken, and the screen remains unchanged.

title: Negative flow: Invalid selection
preconditions: The app is open and on the gallery screen.
test_data: The user selects an invalid animal image from the 3x3 grid.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the gallery screen. | Tap on an animal image in the 3x3 grid that does not match the central pig image.
expected_result: No action is taken, and the screen remains unchanged.

title: Boundary validation: Empty grid
preconditions: The app is open and on the gallery screen.
test_data: The 3x3 grid of animal images is empty.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the gallery screen. | Ensure the 3x3 grid of animal images is empty.
expected_result: The screen displays a message indicating that the grid is empty.

title: UI test: Back arrow button
preconditions: The app is open and on the gallery screen.
test_data: The user interacts with the back arrow button.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the gallery screen. | Tap on the back arrow button in the top left corner.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Usability test: Accessibility
preconditions: The app is open and on the gallery screen.
test_data: The user interacts with the back arrow button using a screen reader.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the gallery screen. | Use a screen reader to interact with the back arrow button in the top left corner.
expected_result: The user is able to navigate back to the previous screen using the screen reader.

preconditions: The app is open and on the gallery screen.
test_data: The user interacts with the back arrow button.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the gallery screen. | Tap on the back arrow button in the top left corner.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

test_data: The user interacts with the back arrow button.
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the gallery screen. | Tap on the back arrow button in the top left corner.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.
